s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT OIL PUMP OIL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a hammer, install a new oil seal to the oil pump body.

atten4.ptxt: The seal end should be flush with the outer edge of the oil pump.

s2.ptxt: Coat the lip of the oil seal with MP grease.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT OIL PUMP BODY O-RING

s2.ptxt: Coat a new O-ring with ATF, and install it to the oil pump body.

item.ptxt: Install the O-ring carefully not to have a twist or a pinching.
Apply enough ATF to the O-ring prior to installation.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT OIL PUMP DRIVEN GEAR

s2.ptxt: Coat the front oil pump driven gear with ATF, and install it to the oil pump body with the marked side up.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT OIL PUMP DRIVE GEAR

s2.ptxt: Coat the front oil pump drive gear with ATF, and install it to the oil pump body with the marked side up.
Align the bolt holes in the stator shaft assembly with those in the front oil pump and gear body sub-assembly.
Using a torx socket (T30), install the 11 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH DRUM OIL SEAL RING

s2.ptxt: Coat 2 new clutch drum oil seal rings with ATF.
Install the 2 clutch drum oil seal rings.

atten3.ptxt: Do not expand the ring ends excessively.
